basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The East Coast Railway (East Coast Railway) has officially announced the Junior Engineer (TRS) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 15-05-2026 at East Coast Railway Official Website. Candidates who meet the maximum age criteria of 47 years and hold a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship qualification, or 10+2 in Science Stream can now submit their offline applications from 15-05-2026 to 05-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, 10+2 in Science Stream
qualification.details: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering branch including their sub stream branches OR ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass OR 10+2 in Science Stream

selection_process: Written Examination (CBT/TBT Mode) Scrutiny of Service Record and last three years APARs Medical Examination (A-3 classification)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (TRS) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rrcbbs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (TRS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (TRS) recruitment is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Junior Engineer (TRS).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Engineer (TRS) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer (TRS) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer (TRS) post is 47 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer (TRS) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Engineer (TRS) post is Level-06 in the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, or ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, or 10+2 in Science Stream.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination (CBT/TBT Mode), Scrutiny of Service Record and APARs, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
